calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Micahel S. Rossoff, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOING NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION.
Olga Cardona sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant MERRILL SMITH.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited, void, and of no effect.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1460 Ellis Street, #35, San Francisco, CA 94103.
Damages $1,594.60
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,594.60
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Line 8

Judge Pro Tem: None; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501/502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff is present via representative Olga Cardona.
Attorney Michael S Rossoff (415-863-7100), counsel for the plaintiff is present.
No appearance by defendant.

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-24-2014 remains on calendar.
